_instructions: Copy this file, fill in your values, then configure as Environment Variables in n8n Settings > Variables. DO NOT commit real credentials to git.

kommo._note: Get token from Kommo > Settings > Integrations > Private Integrations

meta_ads._note: Use System User token from Meta Business Manager. TEST_EVENT_CODE only for testing, remove in production.

google_ads._note: OAuth2 credentials configured separately in n8n. Developer token from Google Ads API Center.

tiktok_ads._note: Get access token from TikTok for Business > Assets > Events > Manage > Web Events > Settings

linkedin_ads._note: OAuth2 token with r_ads_reporting and rw_conversions scopes
